hero_subtitle: Your step-by-step interactive guide to becoming a wise and informed voter.
step_1_desc: Voter registration is the first and most crucial step. You must be at least 18 years old and a citizen of the country. In India, you can register via the NVSP portal or by filling Form 6.
step_2_desc: Political parties and independent individuals nominate their candidates for the election. They must submit affidavits detailing their criminal records, assets, and liabilities.
step_3_desc: Candidates campaign to win voters' support through rallies, manifestos, and public debates. The Election Commission enforces a Model Code of Conduct during this time.
step_4_desc: On polling day, registered voters visit their assigned polling booth to cast their vote secretly using EVMs (Electronic Voting Machines) or ballot papers.
step_5_desc: Votes are counted under strict supervision. The candidate with the most votes in a constituency is declared the winner, and the party with the majority forms the government.
guide_subtitle: Follow the steps below to understand how the election process works from start to finish.
sim_subtitle: Experience how voting works. Select a candidate, cast your vote, and see how results are calculated.
evm_instruct: Select your preferred candidate and click 'Cast Vote'.
about_to_vote: You are about to vote for
tools_subtitle: Use these utilities to check your eligibility and prepare the necessary documents.
are_you_citizen: Are you a citizen of the country?
eligible_msg: You are eligible to vote! Make sure to register.
not_citizen_msg: Only citizens are eligible to vote.
underage_msg: You must be at least 18 years old. You will be eligible in {{years}} years.
checklist_desc: Select your residence type to see required documents for registration.
doc_aadhaar: Aadhaar Card, Passport, or Electricity Bill
map_desc: Find the closest polling booth based on your location.
geolocation_unsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
chart_desc: Historical data of voter turnout and party performance.
manifesto_desc: Fetch manifestos of political parties participating in your specific area using AI.
analyzing_ai: Analyzing local election data with AI...
error_fetching_ai: Failed to fetch data from AI. Please try again later.
sir_desc: Get updates on the Special Summary Revision for your state. Find out current dates, required documents, and important voter roll updates.
loading_parties: Loading real political parties for your location...
vote_confidential_msg: In a real election, your vote remains strictly confidential. The EVM does not show running totals or results to ensure a free and fair democratic process.
chart_state_rank: ranked #{{rank}} across all Indian states and UTs in voter turnout for the 2024 Lok Sabha Elections.
can_vote_info: You can check your name in the draft electoral roll online or at your local polling booth.
chart_state_rank_na: voter turnout data shown for the 2024 Lok Sabha Elections.
vote_quote_1: The vote is the most powerful nonviolent tool we have.
vote_quote_2: Voting is not only our right—it is our power.
vote_quote_3: Democracy is based upon the conviction there are extraordinary possibilities in ordinary people.
vote_quote_4: Your vote is your voice. Don't stay silent.
vote_quote_5: Elections belong to the people. It's their decision.
